title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a feature within Google's Gemini that generates working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates six levels of functionality from document editing to advanced feature combinations, highlighting capabilities and limitations.
writeup: This tutorial covers Gemini Canvas, a Google AI tool that generates working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from text prompts. It demonstrates six levels of capability, ranging from document editing to advanced feature combinations, and identifies where the tool falls short. The progression from basic editing to combined features shows how prompt engineering drives the tool's code generation, and the limitations section sets expectations for what Canvas cannot do.
